JOURNEY.TITLE: Your Journey

SNAPSHOT.FULL_JOURNEY_BODY_STUDENT: The full journey has six chapters — from first steps to fluency. You're starting at {{chapter}} for now. Each chapter has 3–5 phases, usually spread over several lessons — not one class per phase — before you climb to the next landscape.
SNAPSHOT.FULL_JOURNEY_BODY_TUTOR: The full journey has six chapters — from desert foothills to fluency peak. Your student is starting at {{chapter}} for now. Each chapter has 3–5 phases, usually spread over several lessons — not one class per phase.
SNAPSHOT.FULL_JOURNEY_PLACEMENT_NOTE_TUTOR: If a lesson analysis shows a higher level than the map, that's expected. Everyone starts at A1; we only move a student to a new chapter after they consistently demonstrate their level across several lessons — not from one session.

JOURNEY.ROADMAP_SUB: Each phase is roughly 5 lessons. You progress as you go.
JOURNEY.RECOMMENDED_TITLE: Practice for what we worked on
JOURNEY.RECOMMENDED_SUB: Hand-picked materials matched to the things you struggled with most.

JOURNEY.PREMIUM_TEASER_BODY: Premium adds an AI coach that rewrites your plan and next-lesson focus after every lesson — and removes the wait if you ever want to change your goal.
JOURNEY.PREMIUM_TEASER_SUB: AI rewrites your plan after every lesson. No goal-change cooldown.
JOURNEY.EMPTY_TITLE: Your journey starts with a goal
JOURNEY.EMPTY_BODY: Tell us why you're learning and we'll build a personalized roadmap of phases — designed for the way you actually want to use the language.

JOURNEY.EMPTY_PREVIEW_P1: Find your footing in real conversations
JOURNEY.EMPTY_PREVIEW_P2: Handle daily life situations with ease

CEFR.AGREEMENT_HIGH_LONG: Your AI and tutor assessments line up — you're consistently at this level.

CEFR.AGREEMENT_LOW_LONG: Your recent lessons span a wider range. Take a few more lessons for a sharper estimate.
CEFR.PROFILE_NOT_YET_TITLE: We'll estimate your level after a few lessons
CEFR.PROFILE_NOT_YET_BODY: After 5 completed lessons (or your first chapter graduation), we'll surface a clear, evidence-based CEFR estimate here. Tutor assessments are weighted alongside AI signals.
CEFR.DIVERGENCE_TITLE: Your tutors and the AI don't quite agree
CEFR.DIVERGENCE_BODY: AI signals point to {{aiLevel}}; your tutors lean toward {{tutorLevel}}. Take a few more lessons — the picture usually sharpens.
CEFR.DIVERGENCE_SPLIT_TITLE: Your tutors don't quite agree yet
CEFR.DIVERGENCE_SPLIT_BODY: Their assessments range from {{lowLevel}} to {{highLevel}}, so this is an early estimate. A few more lessons will sharpen it.

INTRO.S1_EYEBROW: Starting chapter · based on what you told us
INTRO.S1_BODY: We've turned your goal into a starting roadmap for your first chapter. Your tutor and our AI will refine it once you've had a few lessons.
INTRO.S1_CALLOUT: We haven't heard you speak {{language}} yet. Your first few lessons help us find the right place on the map — we may adjust this chapter up or down. No pressure; just be yourself.
INTRO.S1B_BODY: These are the steps we'll work through in this chapter — you can personalise them anytime.
INTRO.S1B_CALLOUT: This is a starting place based on what you told us, not your final level. Your first few lessons help us find where you really belong — we may move you to a better-fitting chapter.
INTRO.S2_BODY: Your tutor and our AI review how each lesson went, then update what to work on next — so you're always practicing what actually matters right now.
INTRO.S2_GUIDE: Think of this roadmap as a guide, not a script. Your tutor may follow it closely or take their own path — either way, your plan will reflect where you really are and how you're progressing, and we'll keep moving you to the right place.
INTRO.S2_HINT: You'll see your updated focus on Home and in Your Journey.
INTRO.S3_BODY: The full journey has six chapters — from first steps to fluency. You're starting at {{chapter}} for now. Each chapter has 3–5 phases, usually spread over several lessons — not one class per phase. Complete this chapter, then climb to the next landscape.
INTRO.S4_BODY: Tap any phase on Your Journey to edit it, or change your goal when life changes.
INTRO.S4_NEXT_STEP: Your next step: find a tutor and book your first lesson.
INTRO.EDIT_SUB: Adjust the phase names or descriptions to better reflect your own goals.

CHAPTER_COMPLETE.BODY_GRADUATED: You've graduated to the next chapter. New backdrop, new phases, new focus — all tuned to where you are now.
CHAPTER_COMPLETE.BODY_DEMOTED: We noticed your last few lessons were tougher than usual. Let's spend a little more time at this level so the next one feels effortless.
CHAPTER_COMPLETE.BODY_MASTERY: You've reached C2 — the highest chapter. From here it's about staying sharp with weekly challenges and real-world practice.
CHAPTER_COMPLETE.BODY_PROMOTED: Your first lessons told us you're already past this level. Welcome to your new chapter — we'll keep tuning as we go.
CHAPTER_COMPLETE.LIVE_TOAST_GRADUATED: Chapter complete — your new map is ready

JOURNEY.DECAY_WARNING_TOAST: Last few lessons were tough — your tutor will help next time.
JOURNEY.HUMAN_INTERVENTION_TOAST: Things have been bumpy. Want to chat with a tutor about your plan?
JOURNEY.PHASE_SPLIT_TOAST: Your tutor noticed this phase is harder than expected. We've split it in two — same total length, more time to master it.

PROGRESSION.MODAL_BODY_1: You'll move to the next phase when your recent lessons feel consistently solid. We look at your last few lessons together — grammar, fluency, the way you handle the conversation — to gauge when you're ready. Your tutor's read on this matters too.
PROGRESSION.MODAL_BODY_2: There's no exam, no score to chase, and no fixed number of lessons. Some phases click after a handful of lessons; others take a little longer.
PROGRESSION.MODAL_FOOTNOTE: You'll never be stuck. If you've been working on the same phase for a while, we'll move you forward to keep things fresh — even if there's still ground to cover.

SPLIT.NODE_TOOLTIP: We split this phase to give you more time on it.
SPLIT.CARD_BODY: We split this phase in two so you have more time to master it. The total lesson budget is unchanged.
SPLIT.MODAL_BODY_1: When the system notices a phase is harder than expected — usually because mastery hasn't reached the threshold after several lessons — we split it into two smaller sub-phases.
SPLIT.MODAL_BODY_2: You don't lose any progress. The total number of lessons stays the same. You just get a clearer focus area at a time, instead of trying to absorb everything at once.
SPLIT.MODAL_FOOTNOTE: Splits only happen for premium plans, and only once per phase.

RECOVERY.NODE_TOOLTIP: A consolidation phase before stepping back up.
RECOVERY.CARD_BODY: Quick consolidation here. We're locking in what you already know before stepping you back up — no pressure, just steady reps.

INTRO.S1_EYEBROW: Student journeys · what tutors should know
INTRO.S1_TITLE: Your students learn on a journey
INTRO.S1_BODY: Many students get a personalized roadmap — a chapter made of phases that evolves after each lesson. You'll see their map and focus in lesson details.
INTRO.S1_CALLOUT: Students set a goal during onboarding. We turn that into a starting chapter; you and our AI refine it once they've had a few lessons.
INTRO.S1_UNFRAMED: Not every student uses a structured journey. They can also book standalone lessons — you'll still see focus and lesson prep either way.
INTRO.S1B_BODY: Each chapter has a few phases — usually three to five — with several lessons per phase. You'll see them on the map when you open a lesson.
INTRO.S1B_CALLOUT: This is where the student starts — not their final level. First lessons may shift them to a better-fitting chapter.
INTRO.EXAMPLE_PHASE_1: Find your footing in real conversations
INTRO.EXAMPLE_PHASE_2: Handle daily life situations with ease
INTRO.EXAMPLE_PHASE_5: Wrap up the chapter with real-world practice
INTRO.S2_BODY: After each lesson, you and our AI review how it went and update what to work on next — so students always practice what matters now.
INTRO.S2_GUIDE: The roadmap is a guide, not a script. Follow it closely or take your own path — either way, the student's plan reflects their real progress.
INTRO.S2_HINT: You'll see their updated focus on Home and in lesson details.
INTRO.S3_BODY: The full journey has six chapters — from desert foothills to fluency peak. Your student is starting at {{chapter}} for now. Each chapter has 3–5 phases, usually spread over several lessons — not one class per phase.
INTRO.S4_BODY: Open any upcoming lesson to preview their journey map, adjust suggested focus, and see which phase they're on.
INTRO.S4_PROFILE_NUDGE: You still have {{remaining}} of {{total}} items to complete before your profile goes live and students can find you.

TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TITLE: New Trial Lesson Scheduled
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.INTRO: A new student has booked a trial lesson with you.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.PREPARATION_INTRO: This is your first session together, so it's a great opportunity to make a strong impression. Here are a few suggestions to help you prepare:
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_1_SUFFIX: to understand their level, goals, and interests.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_2: Arrive a few minutes early—you can join the lesson directly from your Home Page or the Lessons tab.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_3: Prepare a short introduction activity to help break the ice and understand their speaking ability.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_4: Ask about their objectives and preferred learning style; this will help guide future lessons.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_5: Be welcoming and supportive—trial sessions often determine whether the student will continue with you.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.SUPPORT_TEXT: If you have any questions, feel free to contact support at any time.

TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_IC_INTRO: By using Barnabi as a tutor, you agree to the following terms. Please read each clause carefully before accepting.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_1_BODY: You are an independent contractor, not an employee of Barnabi. You are responsible for your own taxes, insurance, and business expenses. Barnabi does not withhold taxes on your behalf.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_2_BODY: You are solely responsible for reporting and paying all applicable taxes in your country of residence. US Persons may receive a 1099-NEC; non-US Persons may be asked to provide a W-8BEN form.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_3_BODY: You agree to provide high-quality, professional instruction. You will not engage in harassment, discrimination, or any conduct that violates our community guidelines. Barnabi reserves the right to remove tutors who violate these standards.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_4_BODY: You retain ownership of your original teaching materials. By uploading content to Barnabi, you grant us a non-exclusive license to display and distribute it within the platform for the purpose of delivering your services.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_5_BODY: Earnings are paid out weekly via your selected payout method. Barnabi retains a platform fee from each transaction. Cancellation and refund policies apply as outlined in our tutor policies.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_6_BODY: Either party may terminate this agreement at any time. Upon termination, any outstanding earnings will be paid out according to the standard schedule. Your content will be removed from the platform within 30 days.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CHECKBOX_LABEL: I have read and agree to the Independent Contractor Agreement, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy.

DESCRIPTION.ITEM1_DESC: Explain what students will learn or practice in this material.

WHY_TAKE.ITEM1_DESC: A short line that appears on your material card.

LANGUAGE_LEVEL.ITEM1_DESC: The language students will read, hear, or study in.
LANGUAGE_LEVEL.ITEM2_DESC: Helps students pick material that matches their ability.
LANGUAGE_LEVEL.ITEM3_DESC: Accurate tags improve discovery in search and browse.

TAGS.ITEM1_DESC: Tags help students find your material when browsing topics.
TAGS.ITEM2_DESC: Pick tags that match grammar, skills, or themes you cover.
TAGS.ITEM3_DESC: Choose the most relevant ones — quality over quantity.

CUSTOM_TOPICS.ITEM1_DESC: Add niche topics not covered by standard tags.

CUSTOM_TOPICS.ITEM3_DESC: e.g. Dominican slang, DELE B2, business email.

THUMBNAIL.ITEM1_DESC: Materials with covers get more clicks in the library.
THUMBNAIL.ITEM2_DESC: You'll crop to the card shape after uploading.
THUMBNAIL.ITEM3_DESC: A cover image is required before you can publish.

READING_PASSAGE.ITEM1_DESC: Students read this text before answering your questions.
READING_PASSAGE.ITEM2_DESC: Use headings and lists to structure longer passages.

LISTENING_AUDIO.ITEM3_DESC: For YouTube or Vimeo, use a Video Quiz instead.

PRICE.ITEM1_DESC: What students pay for one-time quiz access.
PRICE.ITEM2_DESC: Price is per material, not per lesson.
PRICE.ITEM3_DESC: You can change this before publishing.

BUNDLE_SHARE.ITEM1_DESC: Students unlock every material in the pack at no cost.
BUNDLE_SHARE.ITEM2_DESC: One price unlocks all materials — often less than buying each separately.

BUNDLE_TITLE.ITEM1_DESC: A clear title tells students what they'll get across all materials.

BUNDLE_TITLE.ITEM3_DESC: Your title appears on bundle cards in the library.

BUNDLE_DESCRIPTION.ITEM1_DESC: Explain what students will practice across the materials.
BUNDLE_DESCRIPTION.ITEM2_DESC: A short overview is enough — details live in each material.
BUNDLE_DESCRIPTION.ITEM3_DESC: Write for learners deciding whether to buy the bundle.

BUNDLE_MATERIALS.ITEM1_DESC: Bundles need two or more published materials.
BUNDLE_MATERIALS.ITEM2_DESC: Students who get the bundle access every material inside it.

BUNDLE_COVER.ITEM1_DESC: Bundles with covers stand out in browse and search.

BUNDLE_LANGUAGE_LEVEL.ITEM1_DESC: The language students will study across the bundle.
BUNDLE_LANGUAGE_LEVEL.ITEM2_DESC: Helps students pick a bundle that matches their ability.
BUNDLE_LANGUAGE_LEVEL.ITEM3_DESC: Accurate language and level improve discovery.

BUNDLE_TAGS.ITEM1_DESC: Tags help students find your bundle when browsing topics.

BUNDLE_TAGS.ITEM3_DESC: Choose the most relevant ones — quality over quantity.

BUNDLE_PRICE.ITEM1_DESC: One payment unlocks every material in the pack.
BUNDLE_PRICE.ITEM2_DESC: Price below the sum of individual materials feels like a deal.
BUNDLE_PRICE.ITEM3_DESC: You can change the price before publishing.

Barnabi is an online marketplace that connects independent language tutors ("Tutors") with language learners ("Students"). Barnabi facilitates bookings, payments, and video lessons but is not a party to the tutor–student relationship and does not employ, endorse, or guarantee the work of any Tutor.

Language lessons are provided by Tutors as independent contractors. The educational outcomes of any lesson are the result of the Tutor's effort and the Student's engagement, not a guarantee made by Barnabi.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S3_BODY:
You must provide accurate, current, and complete information when registering and keep it up to date. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account.

You must notify us immediately of any suspected unauthorised access. Barnabi is not liable for losses resulting from unauthorised use of your account where you have failed to keep your credentials secure.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S4_BODY:
Tutors create profiles that include their languages, qualifications, experience, rates, and availability. Barnabi does not independently verify all credentials listed on tutor profiles. Students are encouraged to review profiles, ratings, and written reviews before booking.

Barnabi reserves the right to remove or suspend any Tutor profile that contains false information or violates these Terms.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S5_BODY:

All payments are processed by Stripe, our third-party payment processor. By booking a lesson or purchasing credits, you authorise the applicable charge to your chosen payment method. Barnabi does not store full card numbers.

Credits purchased are stored in your Barnabi wallet and applied to future bookings. Credits are non-transferable and have no cash value except where required by law.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.TERMS_S6_BODY:
You may cancel a booked lesson before the cancellation deadline shown at checkout. Cancellations made in time are refunded as credits to your Barnabi wallet. Late cancellations or no-shows may result in a partial or no refund.

Tutors who cancel sessions without adequate notice may face credits issued to affected Students and possible account restrictions.

Refunds to your original payment method are processed only where required by applicable consumer protection law. Full details are available in the Help Centre.

Sessions are not recorded by Barnabi unless you explicitly activate a recording feature, and you must obtain consent from the other participant before recording.

LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S1_BODY:
Barnabi ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what personal information we collect, why we collect it, how we use and share it, and the choices you have.

By using Barnabi, you agree to the collection and use of information as described in this Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the Platform.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S2_BODY:
We collect the following categories of information:

• Account data — name, email address, profile photo, country, and language preferences when you register.
• Profile data — for Tutors: qualifications, teaching experience, spoken languages, hourly rate, introduction video, and bio. For Students: learning goals, current level, and native language.
• Lesson data — booking history, session start and end times, attendance, tutor and student ratings and written reviews.
• Payment data — transaction amounts, currency, and payment method details processed and stored by Stripe. We do not store full card numbers on our servers.
• Usage data — pages and features accessed, device type and operating system, browser type, IP address, and approximate location derived from IP.
• Communications — messages sent via in-app chat or to our support team.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S4_BODY:
We share your information only in the following circumstances:

• With Tutors you book — your name, profile photo, and learning goal are shared so the Tutor can prepare for your lesson.
• With Students who book you — Tutors' public profile information (name, photo, bio, rates, reviews) is visible to all users.
• With service providers — Stripe (payment processing), Agora (video infrastructure), Auth0 (authentication), and cloud hosting providers operate under data processing agreements and may only process your data on our behalf.
• For legal reasons — we may disclose data to comply with a legal obligation, court order, or to protect the rights and safety of Barnabi, our users, or the public.

We do not sell your personal data to third parties for advertising purposes.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S5_BODY:
We retain your account and lesson data for as long as your account is active. After account deletion we retain certain records for a reasonable period (typically up to 3 years) to resolve disputes, enforce our agreements, and comply with legal obligations.

Payment transaction records may be retained longer as required by financial regulations. You can request deletion of your personal data by contacting us; we will fulfil such requests to the extent permitted by law.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S6_BODY:
We implement industry-standard security measures including TLS encryption for data in transit and encryption at rest for sensitive data. Access to personal data is restricted to authorised personnel who need it to perform their job functions.

No security system is completely impenetrable. In the event of a data breach that is likely to affect your rights, we will notify you and relevant authorities as required by applicable law. Please use a strong, unique password and do not share your login credentials.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S8_BODY: Barnabi is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information without your consent, please contact us immediately and we will delete that information.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S10_BODY:
Barnabi operates globally. Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your own, including countries that may not provide the same level of data protection as your home jurisdiction.

Where we transfer data internationally, we put in place appropriate safeguards such as standard contractual clauses approved by relevant authorities to protect your information.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S11_BODY:
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we make material changes, we will notify you by email or via an in-app notice before the changes take effect.

The date at the top of this page reflects the most recent revision. Continued use of the Platform after a change takes effect constitutes your acceptance of the revised Policy.
LEGAL_PUBLIC.PRIVACY_S12_BODY:
If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, or wish to exercise your privacy rights, please contact us through in-app support or via the contact email listed in your account settings.

We aim to respond to all privacy-related enquiries within 30 days.
